company.name: Replace with your company
company.product: Replace with your product or service
company.description: Replace with a factual description of what you provide.

audience.description: Replace with the people or teams you serve.
pain_points: replace with a phrase customers use when describing the problem
intent_signals: replace with a phrase that signals active interest or need

offer.summary: Replace with the next step you can honestly offer.

disclosure: Replace with a plain affiliation disclosure.

approved: replace with a claim your team has approved
forbidden: replace with a claim the system must never make

exclusions: replace with content that is irrelevant to outreach
escalation_terms: replace with a topic that requires specialist review

response_families.name: general need
response_families.hypothesis_a: State what Variant A changes and why.
response_families.hypothesis_b: State what Variant B changes and why.
